def test_broken_pipe_handling():
        """Test that broken pipe is handled gracefully."""
        # Use head to close the pipe early
        proc = subprocess.Popen(
            ['./executable', 'src/core.rs'],
            stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
            stderr=subprocess.PIPE
        )
        # Close stdout immediately to trigger broken pipe
        proc.stdout.close()
        proc.wait()
        # Should exit cleanly (exit code 0 for broken pipe or 1 for error)
